mapper.select: SELECT movement.today_inbound_quantity, movement.today_outbound_quantity, stock.waiting_inspection_quantity, stock.available_quantity, stock.hold_quantity, stock.unavailable_quantity, stock.total_stock_quantity, inspection.today_defective_inspection_count FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.movement_type = 'INBOUND' THEN m.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS today_inbound_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN m.movement_type = 'OUTBOUND' THEN m.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS today_outbound_quantity FROM tb_stock_movement m WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.movement_type IN ('INBOUND', 'OUTBOUND') AND m.movement_status = 'COMPLETED' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL AND m.created_at >= #{todayStart} AND m.created_at < #{tomorrowStart} ) movement CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS waiting_inspection_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'COMPLETED' AND u.sales_status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS available_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.sales_status = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS hold_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN u.sales_status = 'UNAVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unavailable_quantity, COUNT(*) AS total_stock_quantity FROM tb_pc_part_unit u WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND ) stock CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS today_defective_inspection_count FROM tb_inspection i WHERE i.company_id = #{companyId} AND i.inspected_at >= #{todayStart} AND i.inspected_at < #{tomorrowStart} AND (i.result = 'FAIL' OR i.grade = 'DEFECTIVE') ) inspection

WITH part_counts AS ( SELECT p.part_id, c.category_name, CONCAT(p.part_name, CASE WHEN p.model_name IS NOT NULL AND p.model_name != '' THEN CONCAT(' ', p.model_name) ELSE '' END) AS title, SUM(CASE WHEN u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting_count, SUM(CASE WHEN u.sales_status = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hold_count, SUM(CASE WHEN u.sales_status = 'UNAVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unavailable_count FROM tb_pc_part_unit u INNER JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id INNER JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND GROUP BY p.part_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name ) SELECT todo_type.type, todo_type.label, part_counts.title, CASE todo_type.sort_order WHEN 1 THEN part_counts.waiting_count WHEN 2 THEN part_counts.hold_count ELSE part_counts.unavailable_count END AS count, part_counts.part_id, part_counts.category_name, todo_type.route, todo_type.part_state FROM part_counts CROSS JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS sort_order, 'INSPECTION_WAITING' AS type, '검수 대기' AS label, 'inspection' AS route, NULL AS part_state UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'STOCK_HOLD', '판매 보류', 'part-units', 'STOCK_HOLD' UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'STOCK_UNAVAILABLE', '판매 불가', 'part-units', 'STOCK_UNAVAILABLE' ) todo_type WHERE CASE todo_type.sort_order WHEN 1 THEN part_counts.waiting_count WHEN 2 THEN part_counts.hold_count ELSE part_counts.unavailable_count END > 0 ORDER BY todo_type.sort_order ASC, count DESC, part_counts.title ASC LIMIT #{size}
